title: Payload day click on calendar doesn't contain what day was clicked
description: Calendar select event fires with year/month/day/date but payload-delegate.ts didn't forward these coords to the CLI. CLI received zeros. Also viewer handleEvent was missing calendar args.
resolution: Added year/month/day/date/direction/query/id/content to payload-delegate.ts coord forwarding. Also added same args to viewer handleEvent CLI forwarding. Fixed tickets dir path.
